fixes.replacement:
from psycopg2 import sql

cmd = sql.SQL("COPY {} (sku, name, qty) FROM %s WITH (FORMAT csv, DELIMITER E'\\t')").format(sql.Identifier(table))

cur.execute(cmd, (file_path,))
